extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won a headwind-controlled sprint stage after GILBERT Philippe triggered a failed echelon split at 66km to go on slight crosswind.
tactical_patterns: GILBERT Philippe initiated echelon attack 66km out on marginal crosswind that required NARSEN Oliver, STUYVEN Jasper presence to legitimize.
SCHACHMANN Maximilian hunted intermediate sprint bonus seconds at Vion to claw back time on ROGLIČ Primož yellow jersey.
MØRKØV Michael leadout allowed BENNETT to jump from unsustainably high pace that left rivals BOUHANNI, ACKERMANN sprinting from standstill.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Won by accelerating from already-maximal leadout pace, demonstrating superior power sustainability in long sprint.
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: neutral: Read marginal crosswind correctly but lacked team depth to sustain echelon split 66km from finish.
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: Actively hunting bonus seconds at intermediate sprints reveals GC ambition despite 31-second deficit.
rider_signals.BOUHANNI Nacer: positive: Second place confirms resurgent sprint form despite being gapped by BENNETT's initial acceleration.
rider_signals.MARTIN Tony: negative: Crashed out after hitting road furniture, eliminating DECEUNINCK leadout option for remaining stages.
